daily_tip: Review IAM policies monthly — least privilege drifts over time.

recent_cves.description: A flaw has been found in CodeCanyon Perfex CRM up to 3.4.1. This vulnerability affects the function AbstractKanban::applySortQuery of the file application/services/AbstractKanban.php of the component

A vulnerability has been found in RTGS2017 NagaAgent up to 5.1.0. This issue affects some unknown processing of the file apiserver/routes/extensions.py of the component Skills Endpoint. Such manipulat
A security flaw has been discovered in A-G-U-P-T-A wireshark-mcp edaf604416fbc94a201b4043092d4a1b09a12275/400c3da70074f22f3cce7ccb65304cafc7089c89. This affects the function quick_capture of the file

A security flaw has been discovered in Axle-Bucamp MCP-Docusaurus up to 404bc028e15ec304c9a045528560f4b5f27a17e0. The affected element is the function update_document/continue_document/delete_document

An issue was discovered in Nix before 2.34.7 and Lix before 2.95.2. Unbounded recursion in the NAR (Nix Archive) parser could lead to a stack-to-heap overflow when the parser is run on a coroutine sta
